# FCE-M: Fragmergent Causal Exponentiation Memory — runtime requirements
#
# Mirrors the runtime dependencies declared in pyproject.toml so users
# who prefer requirements.txt-based installs can run the test suite
# end-to-end without `pip install -e .`.
#
# For development extras (pytest, coverage, ruff, mypy), see
# pyproject.toml's [project.optional-dependencies] / dev group:
#   python -m pip install -e ".[dev]"

numpy>=1.24
scipy>=1.10
matplotlib>=3.7

# Test/dev (optional, kept here for convenience). Comment these out for
# strict runtime-only installs.
pytest>=7.0
pytest-cov>=4.0
